ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2012 Continued To Mar-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-04-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonahtan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes and provided argument to support their fee request. The matter was taken under submission subject to receipt of the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-15-2011 Continued To Mar-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Continued To Feb-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-28-2010 Continued To Jan-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Account By The Public Administrator
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator. Barry Schneider for Martha Oklat.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he was told by Mr. Schneider that the family members were working it out, and stated that the Public Administrator would step aside. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond is fixed in the amount of $1,200,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
